name: Sensei Hiro
dialogue: Five Pillars Dojo, eh? I trained there long ago.
Their masters don't go easy on rookies — Earth, Fire, Water, Wind, and Void each demand a different answer.
Don't walk in green. Grind the grasslands, sharpen your bench, build a team that covers every type.
Push your mons past level 20 before you knock on their door. Higher if you can manage it.
When you're ready, the cave sanctum is north of here. Make us proud.
